models.description: Opus 4.7 · Most capable for complex work
Opus 4.6 · Most capable for complex work

values.label: Auto
values.description: Use a model classifier to approve/deny permission prompts.

values.label: Default
values.description: Standard behavior, prompts for dangerous operations

values.label: Accept Edits
values.description: Auto-accept file edit operations

values.label: Plan Mode
values.description: Planning mode, no actual tool execution

values.label: Don't Ask
values.description: Don't prompt for permissions, deny if not pre-approved

values.label: Bypass Permissions
values.description: Bypass all permission checks

models.description: Frontier model for complex coding, research, and real-world work.
Small, fast, and cost-efficient model for simpler coding tasks.
Optimized for professional work and long-running agents.

controls.label: Model
controls.description: Choose which model Codex should use

controls.label: Approval Preset
controls.description: Choose an approval and sandboxing preset for your session

values.label: Read Only
values.description: Codex can read files in the current workspace. Approval is required to edit files or access the internet.

values.label: Default
values.description: Codex can read and edit files in the current workspace, and run commands. Approval is required to access the internet or edit other files. (Identical to Agent mode)

values.label: Full Access
values.description: Codex can edit files outside this workspace and access the internet without asking for approval. Exercise caution when using.

controls.label: Collaboration Mode
controls.description: Choose whether Codex should work in default or planning mode

values.label: Plan
values.description: Switch to planning mode with Codex plan instructions

values.label: Default
values.description: Switch to default execution mode with Codex default instructions

controls.label: Reasoning Effort
controls.description: Choose how much reasoning effort the model should use

values.label: Low
values.description: Fast responses with lighter reasoning

values.label: Medium
values.description: Balances speed and reasoning depth for everyday tasks

values.label: High
values.description: Greater reasoning depth for complex problems

values.label: Xhigh
values.description: Extra high reasoning depth for complex problems

controls.label: Fast Mode
controls.description: Choose whether Codex should use fast mode

values.label: Off
values.description: Use Codex's default service tier

values.label: On
values.description: Request the fast Codex service tier

agents.description: Gemini CLI through its ACP surface.

login.label: Log in with Gemini
login.message: Run Gemini in a terminal, then choose Sign in with Google. If Gemini opens directly into chat, run /auth to switch authentication.

controls.label: Model
controls.description: Gemini model to use. If ACP does not expose a raw model config option, AnyHarness synthesizes this from direct ACP model state and applies it with set_session_model.

values.label: Default
values.description: Prompts for approval

values.label: Auto Edit
values.description: Auto-approves edit tools

values.label: YOLO
values.description: Auto-approves all tools

values.label: Plan
values.description: Read-only mode

launchRemediation.message: Update Cursor tools from Agent Settings, then retry.

controls.label: Model
controls.description: Controls which model is used for responses

controls.label: Mode
controls.description: Controls how the agent executes tasks

values.label: Agent
values.description: Full agent capabilities with tool access

values.label: Plan
values.description: Read-only mode for planning and designing before implementation

values.label: Ask
values.description: Q&A mode - no edits or command execution

controls.label: Model
controls.description: OpenCode model/provider id. More models can be sourced from the last-known live OpenCode snapshot.

values.label: Build
values.description: The default agent. Executes tools based on configured permissions.

values.label: Plan
values.description: Plan mode. Disallows all edit tools.
